title: Josefin Sans Font
description: A resource pack that changes the font of most text characters in the game to one of my favorite fonts, Josefin Sans.
body:
A very simple resource pack that, when applied, changes the global font to one of my favorite fonts, Josefin Sans. 

It uses the TTF font replacement method, which, to be brutally honest, i couldn't really figure out on my own, so i had to use AI and a few youtube tutorials to get it working. If i recall correctly, this resource pack *_should_* work on versions above or at 1.13.

... if it somehow doesen't work as intended, then hit me up on Discord. I don't mind. It's @arcticfloox btw.

Sorry if anything screws up, doesen't work, or whatever, in advance... i'm bad at this, i know. 🥀

"Works on _my_ machine.. Mostly, at least!" - Fluffton

The icon is a lowercase E because, well, i love that letter so much, especially with this font. 

"It's tilted! It's so cute! Wow!" - Fluffton, Again.

License: Common Sense (or atleast, what _should be!_) Don't reupload this without modifying it on another site and / or claim it _all_ as your own, goofy.

Also, i didn't create / don't own Josefin Sans, obviously. Credits go to the original creators, when due, of course.

Check the Gallery for some image(s) of the font in-action!
